records.m_Talk_FRA: P-putting that way makes me sound like some mad scientist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With just one more genius on my level, the pace of work would change completely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With just one more genius on my level, the pace of work would change completely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With just one more genius on my level, the pace of work would change completely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they are from the Dark Council, they may know things I don't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they are from the Dark Council, they may know things I don't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they are from the Dark Council, they may know things I don't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, Haha... I'm so excited.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, Haha... I'm so excited.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, Haha... I'm so excited.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior! Emergency call from ARC-EX!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior! Emergency call from ARC-EX!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior! Emergency call from ARC-EX!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ARC-EX... Former Alexandria reports C.O.s have begun their invasion!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ARC-EX... Former Alexandria reports C.O.s have begun their invasion!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ARC-EX... Former Alexandria reports C.O.s have begun their invasion!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are requesting support, but with the forces we assembled, we can't cover every city!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are requesting support, but with the forces we assembled, we can't cover every city!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are requesting support, but with the forces we assembled, we can't cover every city!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, so the Corruption Inhibitor is useless after all...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, so the Corruption Inhibitor is useless after all...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, so the Corruption Inhibitor is useless after all...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ARC-EX is a mining city that accumulates Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ARC-EX is a mining city that accumulates Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ARC-EX is a mining city that accumulates Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counterside Effects frequently occur in the surrounding desert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counterside Effects frequently occur in the surrounding desert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counterside Effects frequently occur in the surrounding desert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Half the Eternium Lotus consumes practically comes from there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Half the Eternium Lotus consumes practically comes from there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Half the Eternium Lotus consumes practically comes from there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is strategically valuable. We should secure it at all costs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is strategically valuable. We should secure it at all costs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is strategically valuable. We should secure it at all costs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there no TASKFORCE or mercenary unit nearby we can hire?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there no TASKFORCE or mercenary unit nearby we can hire?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there no TASKFORCE or mercenary unit nearby we can hire?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell them we will pay generously.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell them we will pay generously.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell them we will pay generously.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't go, Fatima. This place is just as important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't go, Fatima. This place is just as important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't go, Fatima. This place is just as important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a Senior charged with defending the city, that is a very candid thing to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a Senior charged with defending the city, that is a very candid thing to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a Senior charged with defending the city, that is a very candid thing to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, Fatima, am not disappointed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, Fatima, am not disappointed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, Fatima, am not disappointed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is how you always were.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is how you always were.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is how you always were.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you did not have to say it like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you did not have to say it like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you did not have to say it like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... we asked everyone for support and were refused.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... we asked everyone for support and were refused.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... we asked everyone for support and were refused.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say simultaneous Corruption disasters are breaking out in all their sectors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say simultaneous Corruption disasters are breaking out in all their sectors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say simultaneous Corruption disasters are breaking out in all their sectors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whaaat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whaaat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whaaat?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Th-then we should give up on the Eternium and retreat
8g

Th-then we should give up on the Eternium and retreat
8g

8g

root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there no TASKFORCE or mercenary unit nearby we can hire?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there no TASKFORCE or mercenary unit nearby we can hire?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tell them we will pay generously.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tell them we will pay generously.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tell them we will pay generously.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't go, Fatima. This place is just as important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't go, Fatima. This place is just as important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't go, Fatima. This place is just as important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For a Senior charged with defending the city, that is a very candid thing to say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For a Senior charged with defending the city, that is a very candid thing to say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For a Senior charged with defending the city, that is a very candid thing to say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I, Fatima, am not disappointed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I, Fatima, am not disappointed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I, Fatima, am not disappointed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is how you always were.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is how you always were.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is how you always were.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you did not have to say it like that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you did not have to say it like that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you did not have to say it like that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... we asked everyone for support and were refused.
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... we asked everyone for support and were refused.
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... we asked everyone for support and were refused.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say simultaneous Corruption disasters are breaking out in all their sectors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say simultaneous Corruption disasters are breaking out in all their sectors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say simultaneous Corruption disasters are breaking out in all their sectors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whaaat?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whaaat?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whaaat?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Th-then we should give up on the Eternium and retreat
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Th-then we should give up on the Eternium and retreat
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Th-then we should give up on the Eternium and retreat
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. If we do that, who knows how the C.O.s will use it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. If we do that, who knows how the C.O.s will use it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. If we do that, who knows how the C.O.s will use it.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
In that case, maybe Fatima should
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
In that case, maybe Fatima should
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
In that case, maybe Fatima should
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You must stay calm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You must stay calm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You must stay calm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what can I even do from here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what can I even do from here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what can I even do from here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you push people that hard, how are they supposed to think straight?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you push people that hard, how are they supposed to think straight?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you push people that hard, how are they supposed to think straight?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Who are you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Who are you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Who are you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: People need both carrot and stick. That's how it works.
root.m_Talk_DEU: People need both carrot and stick. That's how it works.
root.m_Talk_FRA: People need both carrot and stick. That's how it works.
